name: the schema rejects an invented axis key in the applies_to object (no CTP-native invention)
command:
printf 'id: g-test-axis
name: axis-rule
description: a rule for testing the 4-axis schema
detector: rubric/detectors/cloud-guidance-rule.sh
type: problem
fixable:
has_suggestions: false
deprecated: false
replaced_by: []
docs_url: https://e.com
requires_type_checking: false
recommended: true
severity: P0
version: 1.0.0
semver: 1.0.0
rule_state: warn-only
provenance:
- source: x
  url: https://e.com
  fetched_at: "2026-06-20T00:00:00Z"
applies_to:
  bogus_axis: [x]
' > r.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/validate-rubric-rule.sh" r.yaml 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'applies_to' e.txt && echo rejected-invented 1>&2
